name: afo-cloudflare-api-mcp
purpose: Schema-clean read-only Cloudflare verifier surface. Provides status, supervised read-only Cloud-Loop evidence, read-only Worker settings inspection, bound-D1 resolution, read-only D1 schema preflight, read-only D1 table inventory, and cached Cloudflare docs search/excerpts. The default connector surface intentionally omits generic endpoint callers, admin writes, deploy tools, D1 write/DDL execution, skill mutation, and spec refresh tools so fresh chats see only read-only verifier capabilities.
